text: I was charged twice for my March subscription. Please refund the duplicate charge immediately, this is the second time it has happened and I am furious.
Hi team, just wanted to say the new dashboard is fantastic. Loading times are way faster. Keep up the great work!
My package was supposed to arrive on Monday but the tracking has not updated in four days. Where is my order #88231?
I can't log into my account. It keeps saying my password is wrong even after I reset it three times. I need access today for a client demo.
Could you add a dark mode to the mobile app? My eyes hurt using it at night. Not urgent but would be lovely.
The export-to-CSV button throws a 500 error every time I click it on the reports page. This is blocking my month-end close.
Please cancel my subscription effective immediately. I no longer need the service and do not want to be billed next month.
How do I invite teammates to my workspace? I looked through the settings but can't find the option anywhere.
Your support agent Maria was incredibly helpful yesterday. She resolved my billing issue in minutes. Give her a raise!
The invoice you sent has the wrong company name on it. We need it corrected for our accounting before we can pay. Fairly urgent.
App crashes on startup on my Pixel 8 after the latest update. Completely unusable now. Please fix ASAP.
Is there a student discount available? I'm a grad student and the pro plan is a bit steep for me right now.
I returned the defective item two weeks ago and still have not received my refund of $149. Getting frustrated with the wait.
Just a heads up, the link in your onboarding email points to a 404 page. Minor issue but you may want to fix it.
URGENT: our entire team is locked out of the production account and we have a launch in two hours. Please help right now.
Loving the API so far. One request: could you bump the rate limit for the /search endpoint? We keep hitting 429s.
The shipping cost at checkout was different from what was advertised. I was quoted free shipping but charged $12.
Thank you for the quick turnaround on my last ticket. Everything is working perfectly now.
I think there is a security issue: I can see another user's order details when I navigate to /orders/0. This seems serious.
Can you explain the difference between the Team and Business plans? The pricing page is a little confusing to me.
